name: tomtom-mcp
description: Provide real-time geospatial context from TomTom - including maps, routing, search geocoding and traffic.
long_description: The TomTom MCP Server simplifies geospatial development by providing seamless access to TomTom's location services, including search, routing, traffic, and dynamic map rendering with native modules bundled.

tools.name: tomtom-geocode
tools.description: Convert street addresses to coordinates (does not support points of interest)

tools.name: tomtom-fuzzy-search
tools.description: Typo-tolerant search for addresses, points of interest, and geographies

tools.name: tomtom-routing
tools.description: Calculate optimal routes between two locations with turn-by-turn directions, distance, and travel time

tools.name: tomtom-waypoint-routing
tools.description: Plan multi-stop routes through 3 or more waypoints in sequence

tools.name: tomtom-reachable-range
tools.description: Determine the area reachable within a specified time or driving distance

tools.name: tomtom-traffic
tools.description: Find and display traffic incidents, accidents, road closures, and congestion in an area

tools.name: tomtom-static-map
tools.description: Generate custom map images with specified center coordinates, zoom levels, and style options

tools.name: tomtom-dynamic-map
tools.description: Render custom map images with markers, drawn lines, polygons, and area overlays

tools.name: tomtom-ev-search
tools.description: Find EV charging stations with real-time availability, connector types, and power levels

tools.name: tomtom-ev-routing
tools.description: Plan long-distance EV routes with automatic charging stop optimization

tools.name: tomtom-search-along-route
tools.description: Find points of interest along a route corridor

tools.name: tomtom-area-search
tools.description: Search for places within a geographic area (circle, polygon, or bounding box)

tools.name: tomtom-data-viz
tools.description: Visualize custom GeoJSON data on an interactive TomTom basemap with markers, heatmaps, clusters, lines, and choropleth maps

tomtom_api_key.title: TomTom API Key
tomtom_api_key.description: Your TomTom API key used to authenticate with TomTom services.

tomtom_maps_backend.title: Maps Backend
tomtom_maps_backend.description: TomTom maps backend to use: 'tomtom-maps' or 'tomtom-orbis-maps' (default). Note: TomTom Orbis Maps is currently in Public Preview and requires explicit enablement for developer accounts.
